banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock company: 'Karoo Holdings Proprietary Limited', a small South African-incorporated private company (a property-holding vehicle) that ceased all trading, income, and expenses at the very start of the 2026 year of assessment (1 March 2025) and has remained fully dormant throughout the year. Filing ITR14 via SARS eFiling as a Dormant Company (Annexure A), self-filed by the Public Officer with no registered tax practitioner, no Voluntary Disclosure Programme application, no Special Economic Zone claim, no capital gains/losses, and one beneficial owner (the sole director). All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real company's information.

collectedValues.label: Company classification
Banking, public officer and contact details verified and confirmed as correct?
Public officer complies with s246 requirements?
Is the company dormant?
Did the company become dormant/inactive during the year of assessment?
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.2(b) — the company was dormant for the entire year, not just part of it

collectedValues.label: Movement in assets, liabilities and/or reserves (R)
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.2(b)(iii)(A) — minor bank-charge/interest movement, well under the R5,000,000 Balance Sheet threshold

collectedValues.label: Is the company a co-operative?
Is the company an association of persons?
Is the company a Collective Investment Scheme?
Is the company a non-profit company?
Is the company a body corporate (Sectional Titles Act)?
Is the company a share block company?
Is the company resident in South Africa for income tax purposes?
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.2(j) — incorporated and effectively managed in South Africa

collectedValues.label: How many beneficial owners does the company have?
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.2(l) — the company's sole director and 100% shareholder

collectedValues.label: How many different classes of shares have been issued?
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.2(m) — a single class of ordinary shares

collectedValues.label: Local capital gain/loss transactions (including crypto)?
Foreign capital gain/loss transactions (including crypto)?
Debt reduced for no consideration (para 12A(4))?
Relates to a Voluntary Disclosure Programme application?
Qualifying SEZ company (s12R)?
Claim s7F deduction for SARS interest repaid?
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.1.6 — the company has never paid SARS interest, so none has been repaid

collectedValues.label: Registered/licensed for customs purposes?
Tax reference number
Year of assessment
Registered name
Trading name
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.1(a)(iv) — trades under its registered name, no separate trading name

collectedValues.label: Company/CC registration number
Financial year-end
Return in respect of a branch/PE/agency of a foreign company?
Province of majority taxable income/loss
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.1(b)(ii) — registered address in Cape Town

collectedValues.label: Standard Industry Code (SIC)
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.1(b)(iii) — real estate activities with own or leased property

collectedValues.label: Profit code of main source of income
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.1(b)(iv) — pre-populated and locked for dormant companies

collectedValues.label: Return completed by a registered tax practitioner
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.2 — self-filed by the Public Officer

collectedValues.label: Reason for dormancy
collectedValues.value: Company ceased all trading activity and disposed of its remaining rental property before the start of the year of assessment; retained only as a dormant holding vehicle pending a decision to deregister or resume trading.
collectedValues.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §11.2.3(a) — free-text reason as selected from SARS' dropdown box (values not enumerated in the source guide)

collectedValues.label: Acting as, or carrying on the activities of, a nominee?
Party to a contract to conduct activity/hold assets on behalf of another person?
Declaration date

notApplicableFields.reason: isCooperative, isAssociationOfPersons, isBodyCorporateSectionalTitles, and isNonProfitCompany are all false — requiredWhen (any) condition false
wantsS7fDeduction is false — requiredWhen condition false
isRegisteredForCustoms is false — requiredWhen condition false
isTaxPractitionerFiling is false — requiredWhen condition false
isTaxPractitionerFiling is false — requiredWhen condition false
isTaxPractitionerFiling is false — requiredWhen condition false
isTaxPractitionerFiling is false — requiredWhen (all) condition false
isActingAsNominee is false — requiredWhen condition false
receivedTaxablePassiveIncome is not applicable/false — requiredWhen condition false
relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme is false — requiredWhen condition false

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective requiredness from the schema's own requiredWhen/required members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator written from scratch for this run), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all 47 fields in schema.fields. Mutation tests confirmed the detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed→publicOfficerCompliant, becameDormantDuringYear→(movementInAssetsLiabilitiesReserves, isCooperative..isResidentInSouthAfrica), doesCompanyHaveMembers' any-of-four gate, wantsS7fDeduction→s7fDeductionAmount, isRegisteredForCustoms→numberOfCustomsClientCodes, isTaxPractitionerFiling→(the four practitioner fields, including the compound all() gate on taxPractitionerEmailAddress), isActingAsNominee→receivedTaxablePassiveIncome→taxablePassiveIncomeAmount, and relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme→vdpApplicationNumber requiredWhen gates all flip correctly when their controlling field's value is changed.
